No Poverty.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to poverty eradication.

Zero Hunger.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to hunger or food security.

Good Health and Well-being.reason: The course directly focuses on 'clinical disease diagnosis and prevention' and 'clinical research of genomic sequencing', strongly aligning with Target 3.b (R&D for diseases, access to medicines).
evidence: 臨床疾病診治和預防的應用價值

Quality Education.reason: As a graduate-level course, it provides quality tertiary education (Target 4.3) and imparts relevant technical skills in biotechnology (Target 4.4).
evidence: 兼具各項生物技術的原理知識和實務應用的能力

Gender Equality.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to gender equality.

Clean Water and Sanitation.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to water or sanitation.

Affordable and Clean Energy.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to energy.

Decent Work and Economic Growth.reason: The course develops advanced biotechnique skills, contributing to technological upgrading and economic productivity in a high-value sector (Target 8.2).
evidence: 提升跨領域之研究合作的潛能

Industry, Innovation and Infrastructure.reason: The course directly enhances scientific research and technological capabilities through topics like 'gene editing' and 'organ on a chip', strongly supporting Target 9.5.
evidence: Application of organ on a chip

Reduced Inequalities.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to reducing inequalities.

Responsible Consumption and Production.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to responsible consumption or production.

Climate Action.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to climate action.

Life Below Water.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to marine life or oceans.

Life on Land.reason: While gene editing is taught, the course text does not explicitly link these biotechniques to biodiversity conservation or genetic resource utilization, making any inference too broad.

Peace, Justice and Strong Institutions.reason: No explicit or implicit evidence in the course description or objectives links to peace, justice, or institutions.

Partnerships for the Goals.reason: The mention of 'interdisciplinary research cooperation' does not explicitly refer to global or international partnerships as defined by SDG 17.
evidence: 提升跨領域之研究合作的潛能
